data.name: WaterFlowModel1DApplicationPlugin_Description
data.value: Allows to simulate 1D flow of water in open water systems, such as rivers and irrigation & drainage channels.

data.name: unstruc
data.value: ..\Resources\unstruc.png;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_GetRoughnessValidationIssuesForSection_Branch___0___has_Q_H_dependent_roughness_defined_on_section
data.value: Branch '{0}' has Q/H dependent roughness defined on section '{1}'. Q/H dependent roughness is only supported on branches with ZW crosssections (tabulated).

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_GetRoughnessValidationIssuesForSection_Branch___0___has_Q_H_dependent_roughness_defined_on_section_2
data.value: Branch '{0}' has Q/H dependent roughness defined on section '{1}'. The Q/H dependent roughness table should have at least two rows.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateInputRestartState_Input_restart_state
data.value: Input restart state

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateExtraResistance_Empty_roughness_table
data.value: Empty roughness table

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateBoundaryConditions_The_boundary_condition__0__has_a_salinity_type_of_None__All_open_boundaries_must_specify_salinity_values_
data.value: The boundary condition {0} has a salinity type of None. All open boundaries must specify salinity values.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateBoundaryConditions_The_boundary_condition__0__has_multiple_connecting_branches__This_is_only_possible_for_waterlevel_boundary_conditions_
data.value: The boundary condition {0} has multiple connecting branches. This is only possible for waterlevel boundary conditions.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidatePump____Capacity_must_be_greater_than_or_equal_to_0_
data.value: ': Capacity must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidatePumpSuctionSide____Suction_start_level_must_be_greater_than_or_equal_to_suction_stop_level_
data.value: ': Suction start level must be greater than or equal to suction stop level.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidatePumpDeliverySide____Delivery_start_level_must_be_less_than_or_equal_to_delivery_stop_level_
data.value: ': Delivery start level must be less than or equal to delivery stop level.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateWeir____Crest_width_must_be_greater_than_or_equal_to_0_
data.value: ': Crest width must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateGatedWeirFormula____Gate_opening_must_be_greater_than_or_equal_to_0_
data.value: ': Gate opening must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateGatedWeirFormula____Maximum_positive_flow_restrictions_must_be_greater_than_or_equal_to_0_
data.value: ': Maximum positive flow restrictions must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateGatedWeirFormula____Maximum_negative_flow_restrictions_must_be_greater_than_or_equal_to_0_
data.value: ': Maximum negative flow restrictions must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: Numerical Parameter Iadvec1D must be 1,2 or 5. Given Value is: {0}

data.value: Numerical Parameter Limtyphu1D must be 1 - 3. Given Value is: {0}

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateModelSettings_Numerical_Parameter_Momdilution1D_must_be_1___3__Given_Value_is___0_
data.value: Numerical Parameter Momdilution1D must be 1 - 3. Given Value is: {0}

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateModelSettings_Grid_output_time_step_must_be_positive_value_
data.value: Grid output time step must be positive value.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateModelSettings_Structures_output_time_step_must_be_positive_value_
data.value: Structures output time step must be positive value.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateModelSettings_The_structures_output_time_step_should_be_a_multiple_of_the_calculation_time_step_
data.value: The structures output time step should be a multiple of the calculation time step.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateModelSettings_No_explicit_working_directory_found__Please_save_model_before_morphology_can_be_run_
data.value: No explicit working directory found. Please save model before morphology can be run.

data.value: Morphology file does not exist.

data.value: Sediment file does not exist.

data.value: Boundary conditions

data.value: Extra resistance

data.value: Could not read file {0} properly, it doesn't exist.

data.value: Could not read file {0} properly, it seems empty

data.value: Could not set roughness data in model

data.value: While reading roughness section an error occured :{0} {1}

data.value: Filling the table of the Q or H function failed!

data.value: Filling the table of the Q or H function failed, values count doesn't match the defined levels count!

data.value: branch ({0}) where the roughness should be put on is not available in the model

data.value: The length of the number of levels '{0}' and the defined number of levels of the branch property '{1}' are not the same for branch properties: {2}.

data.value: Could not read roughness branch data

data.value: Couldn't read roughness section with a function type of : {0}

data.value: Could not read roughness definition data

data.value: Could not import calibrated roughness section {0} because the calibrated roughness section you want to import doesn't exist in the model

data.name: RoughnessDataFileReader_ReadRoughnessSection_When_reading_reverse_roughness_section___0___the_referring__linked___normal__roughness_section___1___is_not_found__The_normal_section___1___should_be_imported_first_
data.value: When reading reverse roughness section ({0}) the referring (linked) 'normal' roughness section ({1}) is not found. The normal section ({1}) should be imported first!

data.name: RoughnessDataFileReader_ReadRoughnessSection_While_creating_the_roughnes_section_from_the_roughness_file_the_roughness_network_coverage_is_not_created
data.value: While creating the roughnes section from the roughness file the roughness network coverage is not created

data.value: While creating the roughnes section from the roughness file the fisrt argument of the roughness network coverage is not created (used to set the interpolation type)

data.value: Error reading NetCdf file {0}

data.value: Initial temperature.

data.value: Values should be in double format.

data.value: The boundary condition {0} has a temperature type of None. All open boundaries must specify temperature values.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateBoundaryConditions_DuplicateValues
data.value: The boundary condition {0} has duplicate values. All values in Q(h) boundaries must be sequential.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DModelDataValidator_ValidateBoundaryConditions_NonSequentialValues
data.value: The boundary condition {0} has non-sequential values. All values in Q(h) boundaries must be sequential.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DSalinityValidator_ValidateSalinityForKuijperVanRijnPrismaticIsValid_F4_Coverage_values_cannot_all_be_set_to_0__Either_remove_them_or_set_a_valid_value_
data.value: F4 Coverage values cannot all be set to 0. Either remove them or assign at least one value different from 0.

data.value: Can not find specified estuary mouth node {0}.

data.value: Estuary mouth node {0} is not a boundary node.

data.value: No Estuary mouth node specified.

data.value: Tabulated cross section {0} cannot have zero width at levels above deepest point of its definition.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DHydroNetworkValidator_ValidateCrossSections_The_maximum_flow_width_of_this_cross_section_does_not_match_the_total_width_of_all_its_sections_
data.value: The maximum flow width of this cross section does not match the total width of all its sections.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DHydroNetworkValidator_ValidateCrossSections_The_maximum_flow_width_of_one_or_more_cross_sections_is_larger_than_the_total_width_of_all_its_sections_
data.value: The maximum flow width of one or more cross sections is larger than the total width of all its sections.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DHydroNetworkValidator_GetCorrectCrossSectionIssue_FloodPlain2_width_may_not_be_larger_than_zero_if_FloodPlain1_width_is_equal_to_zero_
data.value: FloodPlain2 width cannot be larger than 0.0, if FloodPlain1 width is equal to 0.0

data.value: Invalid flow profile

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DHydroNetworkValidator_GetCorrectCrossSectionIssue_No_profile_defined
data.value: No profile defined

data.value: Values for {0} feature type {1} could not be found.

data.value: Error reading MetaData for file: {0}{1}{2}

data.value: Invalid chainage '{0}' in arguments of roughness function '{1}' for branch '{2}'. The import of this roughness function is skipped.

data.name: RoughnessSection_UpdateCoverageForFunction_The_chainage___0___in_the_arguments_of_roughness_function___1____for_branch___2___was_corrected_to___3____to_match_the_branch_length_
data.value: The chainage '{0}' in the arguments of roughness function '{1}' for branch '{2}' was corrected to '{3}', to match the branch length.

data.name: WaterFlowModel1DDiscretizationValidator_CheckBranchLocations_Not_enough_grid_points_defined_for_branch__0___Make_sure_you_have_at_least_gridpoints_at_start_and_end_of_branch_
data.value: Not enough grid points defined for branch {0}. Make sure you have at least gridpoints at start and end of branch.

data.name: RoughnessConverter_Convert_Two_sections_were_found_with_the_header___0____Only_one_of_them_per_file_is_allowed_
data.value: Two sections were found with the header '{0}'. Only one of them per file is allowed.

data.name: RoughnessConverter_Convert_Two_sections_were_found_with_same_header
data.value: Two sections were found with the header '{0}'. Only one of them per file is allowed.

data.name: RoughnessConverter_ReadRoughnessBranchData_An_unexpected_roughness_function_type_has_been_used_
data.value: An unexpected roughness function type has been used.

data.name: RoughnessConverter_ReadRoughnessBranchData_no_specific_roughness_was_added_for_this_branch_
data.value: Branch '{0}' is not available in the model, so there no specific roughness was added for this branch.

data.name: WaterFlowModelTemperatureSetter_SetProperties_Line__0___Parameter___1___found_in_the_md1d_file__This_parameter_will_not_be_imported__since_it_is_not_supported_by_the_GUI
data.value: Line {0}: Parameter '{1}' found in the md1d file. This parameter will not be imported, since it is not supported by the GUI

data.name: WaterFlowModelTemperatureSetter_ParseStringToDouble_Line__0___Parameter___1___will_not_be_imported__Valid_values_are_doubles_only_
data.value: Line {0}: Parameter '{1}' will not be imported. Valid values are doubles only.

data.name: DelftIniPropertyValidator_CheckPropertyAvailability__0__Property___1___on_line_number_is_missing____2___will_be_set_as_default
data.value: {0} Property '{1}' on line number is missing, '{2}' will be set as default

data.name: DelftIniPropertyValidator_CheckPropertyAvailability__0__Property__1__on_line_number_is_invalid____2___will_be_set_as_default
data.value: {0} Property {1} on line number is invalid, '{2}' will be set as default

data.name: ModelDefinitionFileReader_SetProperties_There_is_unrecognized_data_read_from_the_md1d_file_with_header__0_
data.value: There is unrecognized data read from the md1d file with header {0}

data.name: ModelDefinitionFileReaderTest_There_is_unrecognized_data_read_from_the_md1d_file_with_header__0___This_category_has_been_skipped_when_reading_
data.value: There is unrecognized data read from the md1d file with header {0}. This category has been skipped when reading.

data.name: CompositeBranchStructureConverter_CreationOfStructuresAndCompositeBranchStructures_A__0__is_found_in_the_structure_file__line__1___and_this_type_is_not_supported_during_an_import_
data.value: A {0} is found in the structure file (line {1}) and this type is not supported during an import. Therefore it is not imported in the GUI

data.name: BasicStructuresOperations_SetCommonRegionElements_Unable_to_parse__0__property___1___Branch_not_found_in_Network__2_
data.value: Unable to parse {0} property: {1}, Branch not found in Network.{2}
